recommendations.title: Aferim!
recommendations.overview: Set in early 19th century Wallachia, Romania, a policeman, Costandin, is hired by a nobleman to find a Gypsy slave who has run away from his estate after having an affair with his wife.

recommendations.title: The Legion
recommendations.overview: Noreno, a half-Roman, is entrusted with the mission of crossing the snowy mountains of Armenia, swarming with Parthian patrols, to seek help for his slowly dying men.

recommendations.title: Ben-Hur: A Tale of the Christ
recommendations.overview: Erstwhile childhood friends, Judah Ben-Hur and Messala meet again as adults, this time with Roman officer Messala as conqueror and Judah as a wealthy, though conquered, Israelite. A slip of a brick during a Roman parade causes Judah to be sent off as

recommendations.title: Mongol: The Rise of Genghis Khan
recommendations.overview: The story recounts the early life of Genghis Khan, a slave who went on to conquer half the world in the 11th century.

recommendations.title: The Robe
recommendations.overview: Drunk and disillusioned Roman, Marcellus Gallio, wins Jesus' robe in a dice game after the crucifixion. Marcellus has never been a man of faith like his slave, Demetrius, but when Demetrius escapes with the robe, Marcellus experiences disturbing visi

recommendations.title: Agora
recommendations.overview: A historical drama set in Roman Egypt, concerning philosopher Hypatia of Alexandria and her relationship with her slave Davus, who is torn between his love for her and the possibility of gaining his freedom by joining the rising tide of Christianity.

recommendations.title: No Chains, No Masters
recommendations.overview: 1759, Mauritius Island, Indian Ocean. The island is controlled by French settlers and the deported slave population live in fear while toiling in the sugar cane plantations. Unlike her disillusioned father Massamba, 16-year-old Mati refuses to keep h

recommendations.title: The First Omen
recommendations.overview: When a young American woman is sent to Rome to begin a life of service to the church, she encounters a darkness that causes her to question her own faith and uncovers a terrifying conspiracy that hopes to bring about the birth of evil incarnate.

recommendations.title: The Damned
recommendations.overview: In the early days of Nazi Germany, a powerful noble family must adjust to life under the new dictatorship regime.

recommendations.title: The Mission
recommendations.overview: When a Spanish Jesuit goes into the South American wilderness to build a mission in the hope of converting the Indians of the region, a slave hunter is converted and joins his mission. When Spain sells the colony to Portugal, they are forced to defen
